---
title: "BenDiagrams"
subtitle: "A data science lab for sports analytics, economic trends, and code experiments"
listing:
  contents:
    - "sports/*.qmd"
    - "economics/*.qmd"
    - "code/*.qmd"
  type: grid
  max-items: 9
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, date, categories, description]
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## Welcome to The Lab

This is where I break down sports betting algorithms, track economic trends with Python, and share code experiments that answer questions like "Can I predict NBA player props?" or "What does the data say about inflation?"

Think of this as **learning by doing** - every post includes real code, real data, and real results.

---

## Latest Posts

<!-- Listing automatically generates below -->

---

## Newsletter

Want these experiments delivered to your inbox? Sign up below.

<!-- Email capture form will go here - ConvertKit embed -->
<div id="newsletter">
  <p><em>Newsletter signup form coming soon. For now, subscribe via <a href="index.xml">RSS</a>.</em></p>
</div>

---

## About This Site

Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org), published with GitHub Pages, written in Python. All code is reproducible. All data is cited. All experiments are transparent.

If you find something useful, share it. If you find an error, [open an issue](https://github.com/ballard11/Medium/issues).
